title: ochyrorchis egregia
intro: Ochyrorchis egregia, also known as the 'dwarf iris', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ochyrorchis egregia include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Ochyrorchis egregia is often used in salves, creams, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from skin irritations.
